title: Seoul of Manila Golf Tournament 2026
venue: Pradera Verde Golf & Country Club, Pampanga
bank_details_text: Sponsor package reservations are coordinated through the tournament secretariat.
description: A corporate golf and networking tournament built around executive access, premium brand placement, a major hole-in-one prize, and a high-value sponsor package ladder.

overview_facts.label: Official Venue
overview_facts.value: Pradera Verde Golf & Country Club, Pampanga (Pinatubo Course)

overview_facts.label: Hole-in-One Grand Prize
overview_facts.value: 2026 Ford Everest 4x2 Sport on Hole 15 Island Green

partner_pitch: Position your brand directly in front of business owners, key executives, and industry leaders through a premium golf tournament environment designed for face-to-face corporate engagement.

partner_reasons.title: High-value networking
partner_reasons.description: Secure over five hours of uninterrupted casual interaction with high-net-worth individuals, enterprise owners, and corporate executives.

partner_reasons.title: Premium brand association
partner_reasons.description: Align with prestige, athletic excellence, and a world-class championship golf facility.

partner_reasons.title: Organic brand visibility
partner_reasons.description: A luxury SUV grand prize and major cash purse create photography, social media, and sponsor placement moments.

sponsorship_tiers.name: Platinum
benefits: "Presented by [Your Brand]" co-branding on the main welcome arch.
Co-naming rights on the official Ford Everest Hole-in-One field signage.
Exclusive corporate logo placement across all player golf carts.
Dedicated physical activation tent at high-traffic Hole 1 or Hole 18.
Reserved VIP banquet table and 3-minute executive speaking slot.

sponsorship_tiers.name: Gold
benefits: Dedicated branding and booth setup space at a high-visibility Par 3 hole.
Prominent logo on the main sponsor board, backdrops, and giveaway bags.
Exclusive sponsor spotlight feature post across social media channels.

sponsorship_tiers.name: Silver
benefits: Shared banner signage displayed at a designated tee box or putting green.
Opportunity to insert one corporate promotional item or voucher inside giveaway bags.
Digital logo inclusion across all pre-event email newsletters.

sponsorship_tiers.name: Bronze
benefits: Official logo placement on the collective sponsor board at the clubhouse.
Formal corporate acknowledgment and verbal thank-you during the awards ceremony.

title: Batangas Spring Classic
bank_details_text: Pay via bank transfer or GCash before tee time confirmation.
description: A polished tournament experience for serious amateurs and club players who want a premium field, well-run logistics, and a clean path to pay, confirm, and play.

title: Coastal Classic Open
bank_details_text: GCash and bank payment accepted for slot reservation.
description: Fast-moving weekend field with a lighter format and a strong sponsor prize table.

title: Mid-Summer Championship
bank_details_text: Payment verification required before final pairing release.
description: Built for players chasing a bigger purse, tighter tee sheets, and a more competitive bracket.

title: Sunset Links Invitational
bank_details_text: Compact invitational with short payment turnaround.
description: A compact invitational built around match play brackets, tighter fields, and a premium twilight finish.
